meaning: n.[地]亚暴(地球磁层中的一种扰动)
examples: In this paper, a mechanism of the earth's magnetospheric substorm is discussed.
The key problem is if the ions upflow can really trigger the substorm onset? A 3-D resistive MHD simulation is carried o.
The authors consider that the stratification events may be caused by precipitation of particles and closely related to polar substorm.
